title: Build Salad Khatora business management system with in-app notifications and Internet Identity authentication

requirements.text: Implement Internet Identity authentication for admin login with secure session management
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can log in using Internet Identity (passkeys, Google, Microsoft, Apple)
Session persists across page refreshes
Login state is displayed in the UI
Logout functionality works correctly

requirements.text: Create inventory management system with fields for ingredient name, current quantity (in grams or kg), unit type (grams/kg), cost price per unit, supplier name, and low-stock threshold
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can add new ingredients with all required fields
Admin can view list of all ingredients
Admin can edit existing ingredient details
Admin can delete ingredients
Ingredient quantities support decimal values for precision

requirements.text: Implement automatic calculation of total inventory value based on ingredient quantities and cost prices
acceptanceCriteria: Total inventory value is calculated as sum of (quantity × cost price) for all ingredients
Value updates automatically when ingredients are added, edited, or deleted
Value is displayed on inventory page and dashboard

requirements.text: Create menu management for salad bowls with three sizes: 250gm, 350gm, and 500gm, where each bowl recipe is linked to specific ingredient quantities
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create salad bowl recipes with name, size (250gm/350gm/500gm), selling price, and ingredient list
Each ingredient in a recipe has a specified quantity (in grams)
Admin can view all bowl recipes
Admin can edit and delete bowl recipes

requirements.text: Implement billing and sales system to generate invoices with customer name, phone number, items ordered, quantity, price, discount, payment mode, and date, with automatic inventory deduction based on recipe mapping
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create a new sale/invoice with customer details, items, quantity, discount, payment mode
System automatically calculates total price with discount applied
When sale is recorded, ingredient quantities are deducted based on recipe mappings
Invoice includes all required fields: customer name, phone, items, quantity, price, discount, payment mode, date
Admin can view list of all sales/invoices

requirements.text: Create dashboard showing daily, weekly, and monthly sales with filtering options
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays total sales for current day, week, and month
Admin can filter sales by date range
Sales data updates when new invoices are created

requirements.text: Implement profit calculation on dashboard based on cost price (from ingredients) versus selling price (from invoices)
acceptanceCriteria: Profit is calculated as (selling price - total ingredient cost) for each sale
Dashboard shows daily, weekly, and monthly profit totals
Profit margins are displayed as percentage where applicable

requirements.text: Display top-selling salad bowls on dashboard with sales count and revenue
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows top 5 or top 10 best-selling bowls
Each entry shows bowl name, total quantity sold, and total revenue
Data is sortable by quantity or revenue

requirements.text: Implement subscription management module for weekly (6 days/week) and monthly (24 days/month) plans with customer details, plan type, start date, end date, bowl size, price, and payment status
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can create subscription with customer name, plan type (weekly/monthly), start date, bowl size (250gm/350gm/500gm), price, payment status
End date is automatically calculated: weekly = 6 days from start, monthly = 24 days from start
Admin can view all active and expired subscriptions
Admin can edit subscription details and payment status
Subscriptions are automatically marked as expired when end date is reached

requirements.text: Create in-app notification system with bell icon displaying alerts for low inventory (below threshold) and subscriptions ending within 2 days
acceptanceCriteria: Bell icon is displayed in the app header showing notification count
Clicking bell icon opens notification panel
Low-stock alert is generated when ingredient quantity falls below its low-stock threshold
Subscription expiry alert is generated 2 days before end date
Notifications can be marked as read or dismissed
Unread notification count is displayed on bell icon badge

requirements.text: Create customer database with fields for name, mobile number, email, reference source, preferences, and address
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can add new customers with all fields: name, mobile, email, reference, preferences, address
Admin can view list of all customers
Admin can edit customer details
Admin can delete customers
Customer data can be linked to sales and subscriptions

requirements.text: Implement CSV export functionality for sales reports and inventory reports
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can export sales data to CSV with all invoice details
Admin can export inventory data to CSV with all ingredient details
CSV files include proper headers and formatting
Export includes date range filters where applicable

requirements.text: Design mobile-friendly UI with white and green color scheme suitable for a small food business owner
acceptanceCriteria: UI is fully responsive and works on mobile, tablet, and desktop
Primary colors are white and green (#22C55E or similar green shade)
Navigation is intuitive with clear menu structure
Forms are easy to use on mobile devices
Dashboard widgets are optimized for mobile viewing

constraints: Use Internet Identity for authentication (not email/password)
Display notifications in-app only (no email or push notifications)
Follow single-actor Motoko architecture for backend
Use React with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React Query for frontend
All customer messaging features must be in-app only (no SMS, WhatsApp, or external push services)
nonGoals: SMS or WhatsApp messaging to customers

required: Leaf logo icon in green for Salad Khatora brand (logo-leaf.dim_128x128.png)
Simple salad bowl illustration for menu cards (salad-bowl-icon.dim_256x256.png)
